steps.title: optical_link_deep_archetype_scope
steps.key_meaning: lifted optical-link from a narrow pilot into a deep-study archetype

steps.title: cpo_full_cycle_information_registry
steps.key_meaning: built omission-control registry instead of a narrow three-name pilot

steps.title: cpo_information_registry_schema
steps.key_meaning: turned the registry into a reusable collection and review structure

steps.title: parallel_collection_draft_batch
steps.key_meaning: used low-governance subagent-style collection to reduce omission risk

steps.title: adjacent_cohort_validation
steps.key_meaning: separated clean adjacent assets from still-mixed role groups

steps.title: cpo_chronology_normalization
steps.key_meaning: converted event lists into cycle grammar

steps.title: cpo_foundation_readiness_review
steps.key_meaning: froze the boundary between research-ready and training-ready

steps.title: daily_board_chronology_operationalization
steps.key_meaning: turned the board chronology gap into a table spec

steps.title: future_catalyst_calendar_operationalization
steps.key_meaning: turned future-visible catalysts into a recurring calendar spec

steps.title: spillover_sidecar_probe
steps.key_meaning: used sidecar to split candidate-vs-memory without legislating truth

steps.title: adjacent_role_split_sidecar_probe
steps.key_meaning: reduced structural ambiguity in the adjacent layer

steps.title: three_way_challenge_before_experiment
steps.key_meaning: showed that the remaining questions are experiment-type questions, not desk-cleaning questions

steps.title: bounded_cycle_reconstruction_entry
steps.key_meaning: opened the lawful experiment entrance without opening training

subagent_usage.governance_rule: subagents may collect, structure, challenge, or sidecar-split; they may not legislate labels, truth, or phase direction

reusable_rules_for_other_sectors: start with deep archetype scope before narrow training
validate adjacent cohort before chronology normalization
freeze research-readiness before operationalizing remaining gaps
use bounded sidecar probes for residual ambiguity rather than deleting noise
run a challenge round before opening experiment
only open training after bounded experiment proves the remaining ambiguity is manageable
